---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new motor model, analysis method, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: NaveenDeepak
---

## Problem / Motivation
<!-- What limitation or gap does this address?
     E.g. "There is no way to model iron loss for non-sinusoidal flux waveforms." -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as you can about the
     physics/math involved — equations, references, or paper citations are welcome. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Did you consider other approaches? Why is this one better? -->

## Scientific / Engineering Background
<!-- Optional but helpful: relevant equations, references, or domain context.
     This project is a scientific library — the more physics you include, the easier
     it is to implement and review correctly. -->

## Would You Like to Implement This?
- [ ] Yes — I'd like to open a PR for this
- [ ] No — I'm filing this for the maintainer or another contributor

## Additional Context
<!-- Links, papers, related issues, etc. -->
